title: Export Main Table & Updates Together in One Excel Sheet?
excerpt: Currently, when I export a board from Monday.com, the main table and the updates (activity log) are exported as two separate Excel sheets. This means I have to manually combine them afterward, which is quite time-consumi…

posts.author: Ellie (Ellie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, when I export a board from Monday.com, the main table and the updates (activity log) are exported as two separate Excel sheets. This means I have to manually combine them afterward, which is quite time-consuming.

Is there any way (or workaround) to:

  • Export both the main table and the updates (with date and person)
  • Into the same Excel sheet or at least side-by-side in a single export file?
